company_context.scenario_context: Calling into nationwide to make a claim on a roof for hail damage

transcript.content: You are starting a conversation. Scenario: Calling into nationwide to make a claim on a roof for hail damage. Begin as the customer would with a brief opening statement.
Hi there, I’d like to make a claim for hail damage to my roof. Can you help me with that?
Sure thing first ill need your insurance id
My policy number is 123456789. What’s the next step?
awesome i have your account pulled up! do you know our policy on claims?
Yes, I understand the process. I’ll need to provide details like the date and time of the loss, a description of the damage, and any photos I have. What else do you need from me?
awesome, now before i ask any questions is everyone in the household okay?
Yes, everyone is fine, thank you for checking. Just focusing on getting the roof sorted out now.
great so to file your claim go ahead and tell me a little bit about what happened.
We had a hailstorm last weekend, and I noticed significant damage to the shingles and some leaking in the attic. I took some photos of the damage; do you need those now?
no that is okay. for this process you will be assigned a dedicated claims adjustor within one week
That sounds good. How will I know who my claims adjustor is and how to reach them?
sorry my apologies this will happen within 12 hours if you have reviewed our claims process
No problem! So, I’ll hear from my claims associate within 12 hours? That’s great to know. How will they reach me?
